theorem example [Inhabited a] (ts : List (Tree a)) :
 spine (rollup ([Tree.leaf x] ++ ts)) = [Tree.leaf x] ++ ts := by
  induction ts with
  | nil =>
    simp [rollup, foldl1, spine]
  | cons t ts ih =>
    simp [rollup, foldl1, List.foldl] at ih ⊢
